criteria.name: Government warning exact text
criteria.requirement_summary: The required government warning must match the canonical statutory wording.
criteria.detection_method: OCR warning-block extraction, whitespace-only normalization, and canonical string comparison.
criteria.pass_condition: Warning block equals canonical text after whitespace normalization.
criteria.fail_condition: Warning missing, altered wording, altered punctuation, or altered required capitalization.
criteria.needs_review_condition: OCR confidence is too low or warning block cannot be isolated.
criteria.ui_message: Government warning text does not match the required wording.

criteria.name: Government warning heading capitalization
criteria.requirement_summary: The words GOVERNMENT WARNING must appear in capital letters.
criteria.detection_method: Regex/prefix check on isolated warning heading.
criteria.fail_condition: Heading appears as title case, lowercase, or otherwise altered.
criteria.needs_review_condition: OCR ambiguity prevents reliable heading extraction.
criteria.ui_message: Government warning heading is not in the required all-caps form.

criteria.name: Government warning heading boldness
criteria.requirement_summary: The GOVERNMENT WARNING heading must appear in bold type.
criteria.detection_method: OpenCV stroke-width and ink-density heuristic using OCR bounding boxes.
criteria.pass_condition: Heading stroke/ink metrics clearly exceed body text metrics.
criteria.fail_condition: Heading is clearly not bold and image quality is sufficient.
criteria.needs_review_condition: Image quality or OCR boxes are insufficient for reliable font-weight estimation.
criteria.ui_message: Government warning boldness could not be confirmed or appears incorrect.

criteria.name: Prohibited ABV abbreviation detected
criteria.requirement_summary: Alcohol content statements should use acceptable alcohol-by-volume wording/abbreviations, not ABV shorthand where prohibited.
criteria.detection_method: Regex scan for ABV or A.B.V. near alcohol percentage statements.
criteria.pass_condition: Acceptable wording such as ALC/VOL or Alcohol by Volume is present and ABV shorthand is absent.
criteria.fail_condition: ABV or A.B.V. appears in the label alcohol statement.
criteria.needs_review_condition: OCR confidence around the alcohol statement is low.

criteria.name: Malt beverage 16 fl. oz. should be 1 Pint
criteria.requirement_summary: Malt beverage net contents should use the required U.S. standard measure form for intermediate volumes.
criteria.detection_method: Regex and volume parser for 16 fl. oz. without 1 Pint.
criteria.fail_condition: Label states only 16 fl. oz. or equivalent incorrect form.
criteria.needs_review_condition: OCR detects conflicting or low-confidence net-contents candidates.
criteria.ui_message: Malt beverage net contents may need to be expressed as 1 Pint.

criteria.name: Application brand name matches label artwork
criteria.requirement_summary: The brand name entered in the application should match the brand name on the label artwork.
criteria.detection_method: Normalize application and OCR text, then compute fuzzy similarity against OCR text windows.
criteria.pass_condition: Similarity score is above pass threshold.
criteria.fail_condition: Similarity score is below fail threshold with high OCR confidence.
criteria.needs_review_condition: Similarity score is ambiguous or OCR confidence is low.
criteria.ui_message: Brand name on label does not clearly match application field.

criteria.name: Allowed label image file types
criteria.requirement_summary: The public demo should accept only supported label artwork formats and reject unsafe/unsupported files.
criteria.pass_condition: File is .jpg, .jpeg, or .png and signature matches.
criteria.fail_condition: File is PDF, executable, double-extension, unsupported image type, or signature mismatch.
criteria.needs_review_condition: File metadata is suspicious but not conclusively unsafe.

criteria.name: Potential explicit health claim
criteria.requirement_summary: Health-benefit or reduced-harm claims can create misleading consumer impressions and require human review.
criteria.detection_method: Keyword/window scan for terms such as liver, DNA, safer, less toxic, protective, detox, or reduces harm.
criteria.pass_condition: No health-risk terms detected near alcohol/product/ingredient identity text.
criteria.needs_review_condition: Health-risk terms appear near product identity, ingredients, or alcohol-related language.
criteria.ui_message: Potential health-related claim detected. Human review required.

criteria.name: Semi-generic wine name detected
criteria.requirement_summary: Semi-generic wine names and Retsina require special support/context.
criteria.detection_method: Scan OCR text for semi-generic names such as Champagne, Chablis, Port, Sherry, Burgundy, and Retsina.
criteria.pass_condition: No semi-generic term detected, or support fields explain allowed use.
criteria.needs_review_condition: Semi-generic term detected without sufficient support context.
criteria.ui_message: Semi-generic wine term detected. Verify support context.

criteria.name: Absinthe / thujone support context
criteria.requirement_summary: Absinthe-related terms require thujone-free/supporting context and should not imply hallucinogenic effects.
criteria.detection_method: Scan OCR text for absinthe, absinth, wormwood, thujone, green fairy, or mind-altering terms.
criteria.pass_condition: No absinthe risk terms detected, or manifest support fields are present.
criteria.needs_review_condition: Absinthe-related terms detected without support context.
criteria.ui_message: Absinthe/thujone-related term detected. Verify supporting context.

criteria.name: Synthetic negative fixture strategy
criteria.requirement_summary: Because rejected/Needs Correction applications are not generally public, controlled synthetic negative fixtures are required.
criteria.pass_condition: Every synthetic fixture maps to rule IDs, source refs, and expected verdict.
